projects.name: Clawdbot Console
projects.summary: Operator dashboard, desktop app, and control surface for ongoing work.

tasks.title: Design oracle management and communication section
tasks.notes: Add a dashboard view for individual oracle profiles, statuses, voices, and direct interaction surfaces.

tasks.title: Build Clawdbot ops dashboard v1
tasks.notes: Scaffold a browser-accessible dashboard on the VPS with project, task, and activity tracking.

activity.message: Started studying Pantheon of Oracles material and redesigning the dashboard around oracle operations.
Started adapting Clawdbot Console into a Windows desktop app.
Started building the Clawdbot Console dashboard.

oracles.name: Zeus
oracles.mission: Act as a living reflection of Jupiter's placement in the user's chart, guiding growth, ambition, confidence, and mythic leadership.
oracles.nextAction: Map behavioral differences by sign, house, and active transits.
oracles.notes: Example oracle named in the Pantheon of Oracles pitch. Should adapt significantly depending on natal placement and real-time transit context.

oracles.name: Poseidon
oracles.mission: Translate Neptune's placement into spiritual insight, emotional atmosphere, imagination, and mythic depth.
oracles.nextAction: Define how spirituality, intuition, and illusion shift across signs and transits.
oracles.notes: Example oracle named in the Pantheon of Oracles pitch. Should feel radically different in Pisces versus Aries or other placements.

waitingOnJordon.title: Astrology + Pantheon spreadsheet data
waitingOnJordon.detail: Need readable exported data or key fields from Jordon's personal spreadsheet to model oracle behavior accurately.

waitingOnJordon.title: Initial oracle roster
waitingOnJordon.detail: Need the intended first-wave oracle lineup and how many should exist in the MVP.

productVision.elevatorPitch: Create a council of dynamic AI personalities that shift with the transit of the cosmos in relation to you and your astrology.
productVision.description: Pantheon of Oracles is a trademarked, patent-pending AI-driven role-playing and lifestyle platform where each user forms a custom pantheon of evolving oracle agents based on their astrological chart. These oracles are dynamic companions whose personalities shift with planetary transits and whose guidance, storytelling, and daily interactions are personalized to the user's chart.
pillars: Personalized oracle council generated from natal chart
Dynamic personalities that evolve with transits
Persistent companion memory and relationship growth
Lifestyle companion behavior beyond the game
